content.en:
Heavenly Pavilion.

In a retreat chamber.

Ye Tian's consciousness was immersed in the soul, and at this time, the various talents from the source were merging with the talents in the universe, but the fusion process was not very smooth.

Although copying talents can fuse talents, it takes time, and it is impossible to fuse so many talents at once, so the talents seem to be messed up.

"It can't be a problem, right?"

Ye Tian frowned.

If there is a problem with the talent, if it can't be used in a short time, it will directly affect his strength, and those supernatural powers and all kinds of peerless skills will not even be able to exert their due power.

But at this moment, the illusory origin seed emerged and merged into the soul, and the originally chaotic talent began to stabilize, and the talent of the same origin began to merge.

For example, the strength talent began to be integrated into the source force talent, and there was no obstacle at all.

What surprised Ye Tian even more was that all kinds of attribute talents were integrated into the corresponding source attribute talents, such as many fire talents.

Originally, Ye Tian had many, many talents, but now these talents have all disappeared and become part of the source attribute talents.

All of a sudden, the talent panel is much simpler.

After about a few days, all the talents were fused.

Host: Ye Tian

Cultivation Talent: Advanced

Source Talent: God (Extreme)

Source Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Source Talent: God-level (Extreme)

Source Knife Talent: No superior

Source Sword Talent: No superior

Source space-time talent: Super god level

Source Fire Talent: God-level

Source Soil Talent: God-level

Source Gold Talent: God-level

Genmu talent: God level

Source Water Talent: God-level

Source Immortal Talent: God-level

Yuan Hengguang talent: God level

Source Annihilation Talent: God-level

......

"Almost all of my talents have become source talents!"

Ye Tian looked at the new talent and muttered.

Obviously, that Origin Seed played an important role, otherwise his talent would not be easy to transform, and from the current point of view, the transformation of his talent would not change his strength.

But Ye Tian knew very well that his talent was equivalent to breaking a boundary, and he could continue to improve, although it was still very difficult, it was much easier than before.

Other than that.

Source talents are not simple, these talents are no longer interfered with by the origin of the universe, and even have signs of breaking free from the origin of chaos, it is almost completely owned by the owner of the talent itself.

When he was in the source place before, Ye Tian couldn't explore the essence of the source talent, but now he knew that it was related to the origin of the human body.

In other words, these talents are the source talents that evolved from the human body itself.

Ye Tian is immortal, his talents are immortal, if Ye Tian dies, these talents will naturally disappear.

The talent in the universe is different, if the universe disappears, even if it is a transcendent, its talent will probably disappear.

Of course, this is just Ye Tian's speculation.

Wow!

Ye Tian's copying talent shrouded the Heavenly Pavilion, copied the god-level fire talent of a Heavenly Pavilion member, and found that it was actually able to copy successfully.

Before, he already had the same talent, and there was no way to copy it, but now he can copy it.

After the replication was successful, Ye Tian chose to fuse, and soon this talent was successfully fused.

And after the fusion, this talent was quickly absorbed and fused by the source fire talent, or rather, devoured.

"The source fire talent is enhanced a little bit, could it be that this can increase the source fire talent, if this is the case, wouldn't I be able to copy and fuse countless talents and advance my own talent to the super god level?"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he began to copy and fuse, but was soon disappointed.

Although he has fused a large number of god-level talents, his own talent is still at the god level, and the improvement is too small and too small, even if he copies and fuses thousands of talents, it is still far from transforming his own talent.

Ye Tian roughly knew the reason, the talent he copied belonged to the universe talent after all, but his current talent belonged to the origin talent, the talent in the universe could only stimulate and improve the origin talent at most, if you want to completely transform the origin talent, it is estimated that it will take a large number of talents to do it, and you may need to fuse countless god-level talents.

But I have to say that this opened up a new idea for Ye Tian, he at least found a way to transform his talent, even if this method takes a long time, but it is still a way!

In addition to his talent, Ye Tian's Chaos Avenue realm has also undergone a transformation, and the new Chaos Avenue Origin he comprehended in the source has completely swallowed the previous Chaos Avenue Origin, and the two are constantly fused.

Decades later, Ye Tian's Chaos Dao realm had been raised to the late Origin Realm, and the Origin was even more refined, and the previous dross had almost been completely removed.

In the following time, Ye Tian sorted out all his various martial arts, combined with the rules of the source, combat skills, and martial arts attainments, he re-perfected the Heavenly Sword series and the Hunyuan series, and created the fourth form of the Heavenly Sword series and the fourth form of the Hunyuan series.

The fourth style of the Heavenly Knife series is the Heavenly Instant Knife, which pays attention to the fast, surpassing all the fast, integrating the power of the Chaos Avenue into the knife technique, slashing out in an instant, bursting out with unprecedented attack power, the power far exceeds that of the Heavenly Killing Knife, and even surpasses the previous Hunyuan Slash with all its strength.

The fourth form of the Hunyuan series is called the Hunyuan True Body, which can condense a powerful Hunyuan True Body with the origin of the Chaos Dao, which can not only exert the Hunyuan Domain, but also fuse with the main body to explode terrifying power.

In addition, Ye Tian is still perfecting the Hunyuan Slash, once perfected, it will once again become Ye Tian's strongest move.

Subsequently, Ye Tian found that his speed of comprehending the Constant Light Divine Power, the Great Immortal Technique, and the Great Destruction Technique was much faster, which should be the result of the influence of talent transformation.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating the Xuanxu Jue, and the power of the Chaos Dao Origin was fed back to his whole body, allowing the Xuanxu Jue to break the shackles violently and officially promoted to the third layer of the Xuanxu Jue.

Bang!!!!

The physical body began to transform, and a terrifying aura permeated from Ye Tian's body.

The members in the Heavenly Pavilion seemed to feel great terror one by one, but soon this aura dissipated.

They all knew that this should be a sign of a breakthrough in the Pavilion Master's cultivation.

"Two-star god general!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and his eyes were full of joy.

When his talent was transformed, the Chaos Dao Origin Realm was raised to the late Origin Stage, and the fourth form of the Hunyuan System and the Fourth Form of the Heavenly Sword System were created, his strength completely entered the peak combat power of the one-star god general, and he was not far from the two-star god general.

Now, with the breakthrough of Xuan Xuan Jue, his strength has completely stepped into the level of a two-star god general, and it is not the weakest two-star god general's combat power, but it is equivalent to the peak god general combat power in the early stage of the two-star stage.

Such strength can easily crush any one-star god general, and even with Ye Tian's three top divine powers, it is enough to save his life in the hands of a powerful two-star god general, and he is even expected to escape in the hands of a three-star god general.

At this moment, he really has the confidence to deal with the dual universe era!
